# Support for DevForge

## 🌐 Documentation

Before asking for help, please check:

- **[README.md](../README.md)** — setup instructions, feature overview, keyboard shortcuts
- **[CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)** — guide for contributors, adding lessons
- **[CHANGELOG.md](../CHANGELOG.md)** — version history and known issues

## 🐛 Bug Reports

Found a bug? Please [open a bug report](https://github.com/Babin123456/DevForge/issues/new?labels=bug&template=bug_report.md)
and include:

- Browser name and version
- Steps to reproduce
- Expected vs actual behaviour
- Screenshot (if applicable)

## 💡 Feature Requests

Have an idea? [Open a feature request](https://github.com/Babin123456/DevForge/issues/new?labels=enhancement&template=feature_request.md).

## 🗣 Discussions

For general questions, ideas, or help with lessons, start a
[GitHub Discussion](https://github.com/Babin123456/DevForge/discussions).

## 🏆 Open Source Programs

DevForge welcomes contributions via GSSoC, Hacktoberfest, KWOC, and SWOC.
See [README.md](../README.md#open-source-programs) for details.
